ocr_reason: Dense eval-system slide with multiple panels, labels, and a score table; OCR will be more reliable.

blocks.text: Derive a dataset of cases and a set of criteria — each a binary check, so a fail points straight at the broken dimension. Roll them into one 0–100 success rate the loop can chase.
